app.name: ChronoFox
settings.window.title: ChronoFox Settings
settings.sidebar.title: Settings
settings.page.program.desc: Adjust how ChronoFox behaves on your desktop.
settings.page.theme.desc: Adjust colors, fonts, and display language.
settings.page.integration.desc: Manage backups, exports, and planned sync features.
settings.page.info.desc: Check the app version and local data location.
settings.version.label: Current Version
settings.program.opacity.title: Opacity
settings.program.opacity.desc: Adjust how visible the calendar is on the desktop.
settings.program.holiday.title: Holiday Display
settings.program.holiday.desc: Show major and substitute holidays on the calendar.
settings.program.startup.title: Run at Windows Startup
settings.program.startup.desc: Open ChronoFox automatically when the computer starts.
settings.theme.mode.title: Theme
settings.theme.mode.desc: Choose the color mode for ChronoFox.
settings.theme.font.title: Default Font
settings.theme.font.desc: Choose the font used by the app.
settings.theme.language.title: Language
settings.theme.language.desc: Choose the display language used by the app.
settings.integration.backup.title: Local Backup
settings.integration.backup.desc: Save settings, schedules, plans, todos, and memos as a zip file.
settings.integration.export.title: Calendar Export
settings.integration.export.desc: Create a file that Google Calendar and Microsoft Outlook can import.
settings.integration.cloud.title: Cloud Sync
settings.integration.cloud.desc: Sync and import features are planned for a later update.
settings.info.program.title: Program
settings.info.data.title: Data Location
settings.dialog.backup.title: Save Backup
settings.dialog.export.title: Save Calendar File

Could not create the calendar file.

menu.details.pending: Detailed schedule will be added in a future update.
